data.headline: Sterling & Associates Real Estate
data.body: With over 30 years of experience in northern New Jersey's luxury market, Sterling & Associates delivers unmatched expertise and white-glove service for discerning buyers and sellers.

data.title: Our Services
data.subtitle: Full-service luxury real estate for buyers and sellers.

items.title: Luxury Listings
items.description: Expert marketing and staging for high-end properties in Summit, Short Hills, and Chatham.

items.title: Buyer Representation
items.description: Exclusive access to off-market properties and new developments.

items.title: Market Analysis
items.description: Data-driven pricing strategies backed by decades of local market knowledge.

data.title: How We Work
data.subtitle: A proven process for commercial and luxury real estate transactions.

steps.title: Strategy Session
steps.description: We begin with a confidential consultation to understand your investment goals, timeline, and target property profile.

steps.title: Market Intelligence
steps.description: Our team delivers a comprehensive commercial market analysis — cap rates, comparables, and opportunity gaps in your target area.

steps.title: Deal Execution
steps.description: We identify, negotiate, and structure the transaction — from LOI through due diligence and closing.

steps.title: Post-Closing Support
steps.description: We stay engaged after closing — helping with asset management introductions, 1031 exchange planning, and future acquisitions.

data.title: Recent Sales
data.subtitle: A selection of properties sold by our team.

data.title: Client Reviews
data.subtitle: What our clients say about working with Sterling & Associates.

items.text: Victoria and her team made selling our home a seamless experience. Their market knowledge is unmatched.
James found us the perfect property in Summit. Professional, knowledgeable, and always available.
Sarah negotiated $120K off our Short Hills purchase. Her strategy in a competitive bidding situation was brilliant — we never felt outmatched.
Sterling & Associates handled our commercial property sale with complete discretion and professionalism. Closed in 45 days, well above our asking price.
We relocated from London and Victoria's team made the entire process feel effortless. They understood exactly what we were looking for and delivered.

data.title: Meet Our Team
data.subtitle: Experienced agents dedicated to your success.

items.name: James Whitfield
items.title: Senior Associate
items.bio: James specializes in luxury residential properties across Summit and Short Hills. With 12 years of experience and over $400M in career sales, he brings a detail-oriented approach to every transaction. Certified Residential Specialist (CRS) and Accredited Buyer's Representative (ABR).

items.name: Sarah Chen
items.title: Luxury Specialist
items.bio: Sarah brings 8 years of luxury market expertise and fluency in Mandarin, making her the go-to agent for international buyers relocating to northern New Jersey. She negotiated over $120M in transactions last year alone.

items.name: Robert Dalton
items.title: Commercial Director
items.bio: Robert leads Sterling's commercial division, specializing in retail, office, and mixed-use properties. A former commercial banker with an MBA from Rutgers, he brings financial acumen to every deal structure and 1031 exchange.

items.name: Priya Mehta
items.title: Buyer Specialist
items.bio: Priya is dedicated exclusively to buyer representation, ensuring her clients never compete against her own listings. She has helped over 150 families find their perfect home in Chatham, Summit, and surrounding communities.

items.name: Thomas Reilly
items.title: Investment Advisor
items.bio: Thomas advises high-net-worth clients on residential and commercial investment portfolios. With a background in asset management and 15 years in real estate, he identifies opportunities that deliver long-term value.

items.name: Angela Moreau
items.title: Listing Coordinator
items.bio: Angela manages the listing lifecycle from staging consultation through closing. Her background in interior design and marketing ensures every Sterling listing presents at its absolute best — averaging just 18 days on market.

data.title: Get In Touch
data.subtitle: Contact Sterling & Associates for a complimentary consultation.

data.title: About Sterling & Associates
data.bio: Founded by Victoria Sterling, Sterling & Associates has been serving northern New Jersey's luxury real estate market for over 30 years. Our team of experienced agents brings deep local knowledge and a commitment to exceptional client service.

thank_you.heading: Thank You!
thank_you.body: A member of the Sterling & Associates team will reach out to you soon.
